brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

workflow.name: Create a New Repository
workflow.description: Learn how to create a new repository to host your project.

steps.title: Step 1: Click New
steps.description: Find the 'New' button in your sidebar and click it to start creating a repository.

steps.title: Step 2: Notifications
steps.description: After creating your repo, you'll get notifications about activity here.

steps.title: Step 3: Find Your Repo
steps.description: Use search to quickly find your newly created repository anytime.
